Title: Invoice posts to incorrect GL account on multi-currency transactions
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Create Sales Order for foreign currency customer (EUR). 2. Convert to Invoice. 3. Save and view GL impact.
Expected Result: GL posts to AR Trade (1200) in USD equivalent
Actual Result: GL posts to Suspense account (9999) instead of AR Trade
Resolution Notes: Root cause identified: CUST-O2C-02 User Event script missing currency conversion lookup. Fix in progress.
Notes: Blocks UAT — do not advance until resolved

Title: Discount calculation incorrect for orders over $10000
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Create SO with item subtotal > $10,000. 2. Apply 10% discount code. 3. Check discount amount.
Resolution Notes: Script condition for tiered discount was using wrong comparison operator (> vs >=). Corrected in CUST-O2C-01 v1.2. Workaround: manually enter discount amount until fix is deployed.
Notes: Workaround documented in UAT notes for session O2C-1

Title: PDF invoice logo slightly misaligned on A4 paper format
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Create and save an invoice. 2. Click Print > PDF. 3. View on A4 paper preview.
Expected Result: Logo appears in top-left corner aligned to margin
Actual Result: Logo appears 3mm too far right on A4 format (correct on US Letter)
Resolution Notes: Client accepted deferral in writing 2024-06-19. Fix scheduled for post-go-live sprint 1. Only affects A4 print jobs — US Letter is correct.
Notes: Accepted by sponsor Sarah Johnson on 2024-06-19. Resolution target: 2024-07-15
